problem id: 936c3c1e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) AND SHL(5)

examples:
  10110100 -> 10000000
  01101110 -> 10000000
  01100111 -> 10000000
  10100110 -> 10000000
  01001100 -> 00000000
  01111111 -> 11100000
  00111101 -> 10100000
  11110011 -> 01000000

query: 11001010
predicted answer: 00000000
